activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'SKF Eurotrade' from certificate matches invoice issuer 'SKF Eurotrade AB' after normalization including legal form AB. Address and country Sweden coincide, fulfilling all normalizations and the identification rules. No other differing issuer found. Based on rules 4.1.0 (corporate name confirmed), 4.1.3.6 (legal form abbreviation), and 4.1.4 (country match).

consignee.certificate_value:

100084 Tashkent
UZBEKISTAN
consignee.invoice_value:
Intertrade and Service LLP
Yunusabad, Shuhrat str.15A
100084 Tashkent
Uzbekistan
consignee.motivation: Consignee name and address fields match exactly between certificate and invoice for 'Intertrade and Service LLP' including detailed address and country Uzbekistan, conforming to allowed normalization rules. The consignee corresponds to invoice 'Bill to' and 'Sold to' fields, providing a definitive match according to rules 4.2.0, 4.2.2, and 4.2.3.

goods_description.certificate_value: Belts, roller chains, bearings refer to the inv 8500028962 dated: 02.02.2026
goods_description.invoice_value: Detailed itemized goods with corresponding article numbers and descriptions including belts, roller chains and bearings matching invoice number 8500028962 dated 02.02.2026
goods_description.motivation: Certificate contains a general goods description with explicit reference to invoice number 8500028962 dated 02.02.2026. Invoice contains detailed matching item descriptions of belts, roller chains and bearings with the same invoice number and date, fulfilling rule 4.3.5 that accepts general description with invoice reference.

quantity.certificate_value:
GW in KGS:
421,80
NETW in KGS:
364,19
quantity.invoice_value:
Total Gross Weight 421,800 KG
Total Net Weight 364,193 KG
quantity.motivation: Certificate weight quantities GW 421.80 KGS and NW 364.19 KGS match invoice total weights 421.800 KG and 364.193 KG after decimal normalization and trunking. Both weights are explicitly stated in certificate and invoice. This fulfills main quantity verification rules, 4.4.1 for identification, 4.4.3.3 for decimal normalization and 4.4.4 for total weight verification.

origin.certificate_value: Austria, Bulgaria, China, Czech Republic, France, India, Italy, Japan, Malaysia, Slovakia
origin.invoice_value: Invoice item origins clearly indicate Austria, Bulgaria, China, Czech Republic, France, India, Italy, Japan, Malaysia, Slovakia and also European Union as general origin
origin.motivation: Certificate lists multiple countries of origin: Austria, Bulgaria, China, Czech Republic, France, India, Italy, Japan, Malaysia, Slovakia. Invoice explicitly lists these same countries for respective goods origin. EU origin normalization rules apply because certificate states European Union overall, accepted given invoice origin details include these member states. The China-Hong Kong equivalence also considered. This fulfills rules 4.5.4.1 and 4.5.4.2, with land normalization 4.6.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Alla kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland) kan verifieras med explicit textmatchning eller tillåtna normaliseringar. Certifikatets uppgifter finns tydligt identifierbara i fakturan utan avvikelse eller tolkning.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter i certifikatet har verifierats utan avvikelser och dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
